title: palura chinensis var. pilosa
intro: Palura chinensis var. pilosa, also known as the Chinese hairy chrysanthemum or white flower, is a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Palura chinensis var. pilosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
